title: Richer-world recipes, presets + corpus polish: the product/discoverability layer that closes v1.2 — refreshed seed presets (snapshot prerequisite documented) + the set-dressed corpus/ops/demo/ recipe family (+ new recipe-snapshot-world.md) + the /demo-snapshot skill + corpus cross-links + CLAUDE.md skill-table row + the stacksnap --help hygiene fix
kind: curation/discoverability over the shipped M9a/M9b/M10 snapshot surfaces — no new production code path (a one-line help-text fix, comment-only preset headers, 2 regression test files, and markdown); makes the 100%-coverage full-fidelity world usable + discoverable; the M8-analog that closes v1.2

tests.stack_snapshot_delta: +5 (207 -> 212): the harden regression set in cmd/stacksnap/main_drift_test.go — TestHelp_NamesEveryRegisteredSurface + TestHelp_FrameworkTagIncludesLatestMilestone (pin the §5/M11-D4 help fix, registry-driven) + TestDocsFlagsExistInParser + TestDroppedDumpFlagStaysGone + TestDocumentedSourceKindsAreReal (the docs<->parser drift guard for the /demo-snapshot skill + recipes)
tests.stack_seeding_delta: +2 (230 -> 232): blueprint/presets_test.go — TestShippedPresets_ParseStrictAndValidate (each shipped preset through Load[strict KnownFields]+Validate) + TestShippedPresets_SizesAreDistinctAndOrdered (small<mid<large contract)
tests.fuzz_targets: none added in M11 (the M9a/M9b/M10 targets unchanged; M11 added no new parser/data path to fuzz)
tests.race: both Go modules pass go test ./... -race
tests.flake_gate: 5/5 clean across shuffled sequential runs of both M11-touched packages (stack-snapshot/cmd/stacksnap, stack-seeding/blueprint)

coverage.note: harden ran 1 pass (expected short pass for a docs/discoverability milestone; cap not needed). The M11-touched code gaps were assertion-depth, not line: cmd/stacksnap statements 77.7% -> 77.7% (usage was already line-executed by TestRun_Help; the help string content was the unpinned gap). The blueprint preset tests load the real shipped files (a path the suite never exercised before) — value is regression-pinning the product files, not a % move. Remaining uncovered statements are live-DB capture/replay paths (integration-tested, need Postgres; not M11-touched).

by_package_m11_touched_after_harden.cmd/stacksnap_help_contract: 100% assertion-pinned (help string content now pinned by TestHelp_* + the docs<->parser drift guards; package total 77.7%, unchanged — the gap was depth not lines)
by_package_m11_touched_after_harden.blueprint_shipped_presets: the 3 shipped preset files now loaded through the CLI's strict Load+Validate path (new regression anchor; package total unchanged)

delivered.presets: small-200/mid-500/large-1k gained a documented FULL-FIDELITY PREREQUISITE comment-header (replay taxonomy + directus snapshots BEFORE seeding for a set-dressed world; graceful structural-only degradation without). Presets stay PURELY STRUCTURAL — snapshots are stack-global reference data, not org-scoped, so no schema field added (M11-D3)

delivered.demo_snapshot_skill: .claude/skills/demo-snapshot/SKILL.md — a NEW skill (M11-D1, resolves M11-Q2) driving the stacksnap CLI (replay [headline] / capture [rare maintenance] / status); frontmatter + body follow the /demo-seed convention; source-of-truth pointer to snapshot-spec.md; flags verified against the real parser by the drift tests

delivered.hygiene_fix: the stale stacksnap --help text fixed (M11-D4, §5): framework tag M9a/M9b -> M9a/M9b/M10 + the registered-but-unlisted directus surface now listed (the M11 KB-fidelity audit's help-vs-registry drift finding)
delivered.coverage_statement: data-DNA remains 100% over the full catalog (both formerly-waived surfaces snapshot-seeded since M9b/M10); M11 makes that fully discoverable in the corpus + curator flow

notes: M11 is the LAST milestone of v1.2 'set dressing'. It is the M8-analog product/discoverability layer: it curates the 100%-coverage full-fidelity world (shipped by M9a/M9b/M10) into usable presets + recipes + the /demo-snapshot skill, with zero new production code path. Build was sound; the single harden pass pinned two real Fate-1 gaps (the unpinned help contract + the unloaded shipped presets, plus a docs<->parser drift guard) — no production-code defect surfaced. Close found 0 findings. With M11 closed, v1.2 is complete -> the next step is /developer-kit:close-release (merge release/01.20-set-dressing -> main, tag v1.2). The close-milestone Phase 11 merges m11/richer-recipes -> release/01.20-set-dressing and sets the stack-snapshot-m11 extensions tag at 1e18df6; it does NOT run close-release.
next: v1.2 is complete (M11 was the last milestone) -> /developer-kit:close-release (release-level review + merge release/01.20-set-dressing -> main + tag v1.2)
